creator: rpsfa@rit.edu
text:
2.1.11 was released and is now in the tree, which should include the fixes referenced by raj that were in HEAD at the time.

As for threading, the kse/thr stuff happened somewhere around 6.x if memory serves.  It may be possible to 'prove' it's this by switching the threading library used by FR on a machine that is experiencing the issue.

If we are actually in bug territory (and not something dealing with performance), getting something we can send to Alan DeKok that helps illuminate that would be useful in getting his attention.  Hugh, do you know if you suspect a performance issue as Alan mentions or something else?

I'm not sure where else to go on this without additional data.  If anyone has any recommendations, I'd love to hear them.

-r
